description_long: This is a dark metallic helmet reminiscent of ancient Roman or Greek military headgear, featuring a pronounced crest running from front to back along the top. The helmet has a smooth, rounded dome with a subtle ridge encircling its lower half, and a prominent brow guard above the eyes. On each side, there are cheek guards that curve downward and inward, providing additional facial protection. The surface is mostly smooth with a slightly glossy finish, and there are no visible decorative patterns, logos, or ventilation holes. The overall design is utilitarian, focusing on robust protection rather than ornamentation.
description: A dark metallic, crested helmet with cheek guards and a smooth, glossy finish, inspired by ancient military designs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central crest, brow guard, and symmetrical cheek guards.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved cheek guard and the full profile of the crest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the crest and the rounded dome of the helmet.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the cheek guard and crest profile visible.
